subject: A small nebula-like creature with a dark cosmic body, bright golden tuft, and a wide smiling face floating in a starry purple void
description: A small, round creature floats in a purple and star-flecked cosmic space. Its body is deep blue-purple and cloud-like, suggesting it is made of nebular gas or cosmic matter. A bright golden-yellow tuft or wisp protrudes from the top of its head. Its face has wide, happy eyes and a simple smiling expression. Sparkles and small star shapes surround it, enhancing the magical and ethereal atmosphere.
foreground: Small round gaseous cosmic creature with a golden tuft and smiling face
background: Purple starry cosmic void with sparkles
emotion: joyful and carefree; wide smiling face, relaxed posture
